transition.label: i : int[0,N-1], d : int[T_NORMAL,T_LATE]
waiting[i] && candidateFree(laneOf[i], turnOf[i], d) && noEarlierFree(laneOf[i], turnOf[i], d) && mayGo(i)
grant[i]!
assignedDelay[i] = d, assignedEntrySlot[i] = (now + d) % HORIZON, hasSchedule[i] = true, reserveCandidate(laneOf[i], turnOf[i], d), endWait(i)
grant access

template.name: Vehicle
template.parameter: const int id, const int lane, const int mv

transition.label: x >= T_ZONE && zoneStep + 1 < routeLength(lane, mv) && stepFree(lane, mv, zoneStep + 1)
releaseStep(lane, mv, zoneStep), occupyStep(lane, mv, zoneStep + 1), zoneStep = zoneStep + 1, x = 0

query.formula: A[] simTick < SIM_END_TICK imply not deadlock
query.comment: Checks that the model does not deadlock during the active 150-tick simulation window.
Checks that there exists at least one possible execution where the NORTH vehicle enters the critical zone. This confirms that the controller can grant access to N0 for its route.
Checks that there exists at least one possible execution where the SOUTH vehicle enters the critical zone. This confirms that S1 is not permanently blocked by the controller logic.
Checks that there exists at least one possible execution where the EAST vehicle enters the critical zone. This confirms that the model allows E2 to be scheduled and granted access.
Checks that there exists at least one possible execution where the WEST vehicle enters the critical zone. This confirms that W3 can also receive permission from the controller.

Safety property: checks that no critical zone is occupied by more than one vehicle at the same time. This verifies that the controller prevents conflicting vehicles from entering the same critical zone.

query.formula: A[] forall (i : int[0,N-1]) hasSchedule[i] imply assignedDelay[i] >= T_NORMAL && assignedDelay[i] <= T_LATE
query.comment: Checks that every scheduled vehicle receives an entry delay inside the allowed scheduling window.

query.formula: A[] forall (z : int[0,Z-1]) forall (s : int[0,HORIZON-1]) res[z][s] <= 1
query.comment: Checks that no future reservation slot contains more than one vehicle for the same critical zone.
Checks that the model can reach the configured simulation end tick.
Verify that we dont have any collisions
